title: Bubble Sort
subtitle: Kabarcik siralama algoritmasi.
code:
def bubble_sort(arr):
    n = len(arr)
    for i in range(n - 1):
        for j in range(n - i - 1):
            if arr[j] > arr[j + 1]:
                arr[j], arr[j + 1] = arr[j + 1], arr[j]
    return arr


numbers = [64, 34, 25, 12, 22, 11, 90]
print("Siralanmamis dizi:", numbers)

sorted_numbers = bubble_sort(numbers.copy())
print("Siralanmis dizi:", sorted_numbers)

# Adim adim siralama
print("\nAdim adim siralama:")
arr = [5, 2, 9, 1, 5]
n = len(arr)
for i in range(n - 1):
    for j in range(n - i - 1):
        if arr[j] > arr[j + 1]:
            arr[j], arr[j + 1] = arr[j + 1], arr[j]
    print(f"Adim {i + 1}: {arr}")

# Python'un kendi sort fonksiyonu
print("\nPython'un sorted() fonksiyonu:")
data = [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9, 2, 6]
print("Orijinal:", data)
print("Siralanmis:", sorted(data))
print("Ters siralanmis:", sorted(data, reverse=True))
